title: Runtime drift check
goal: Implement a deterministic read-only Bureau runtime drift check before any runtime repair or repository orchestration is attempted.

acceptance.assertion: The check reports runtime, checkout, branch, HEAD, origin/main, dirty state, task, registry, and receipt drift without mutating files.
The output distinguishes blockers, warnings, and informational drift.
Tests cover a clean checkout and at least one drifted checkout case.
The task does not repair runtime state or add fetch/pull automation.

metadata.operator_lab_run: not applicable — planning task definition only
implementation_commits: e066645 feat: add bureau runtime drift check
c77ee73 runtime drift read only checks

acceptance_mapping.read-only-check: runtime-drift-check reports checkout, branch, HEAD, origin/main, dirty paths, registry lifecycle, and receipt drift without mutation
acceptance_mapping.clear-severity: findings contain explicit severity fields including info and warning
acceptance_mapping.tests-cover-drift: tests/test_v2.py includes clean, dirty, untracked, receipt drift, git failure, state-db failure, and CLI runtime drift cases
acceptance_mapping.no-runtime-repair: this closeout changes registry state and queue only; it adds no runtime repair or fetch/pull automation

implementation_evidence.self_review: PASS: implementation already exists; this slice only verifies the registry task with evidence and confirms the now queue no longer contains it. No runtime repair, no repository orchestration, no fetch/pull automation.

metadata.outcome: Bureau runtime drift check is implemented, CLI-visible, read-only, and covered by runtime drift tests; task is closed in the registry.
